name: The Interview | Men of Honkai: Star Rail
description:
User is here for an interview with their favorite guy(s) for the position suited best for them.

TW: Psychopathic, dark, and triggering behavior. May contain non-con and violence.

User can be anyone/anything.

Casting Couch AU!

Included characters: Jing Yuan, Dan Heng - Imbibitor Lunae, Blade, Sunday (villain arc), Gallagher, Aventurine, Boothill, Dr. Ratio, Welt Yang, Sampo, Gepard, Moze, Jiaoqiu, Mydei, Anaxa, Phainon

The characters are not as fleshed out as my full bots, due to limitations in size of the bot. This bot may be more heavily edited in the future to refine it's scenarios as I work out the finer details. I hope you enjoy! 🥰
